# awesome-ai-api

> The world's largest open-source leaderboard of 200+ AI API gateways & relays. Daily /v1/models probe. Bilingual (EN/中文).

## What is awesome-ai-api?

A curated, actively maintained directory of AI API providers — gateways, relays, resellers — with daily automated probing of /v1/models endpoints to verify liveness and model availability.

## Key Features

- 200+ AI API providers tracked
- Daily automated /v1/models probing for liveness verification
- Bilingual documentation (English + Chinese)
- OpenAI-compatible endpoint focus
- Covers: ChatGPT API, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, and more
- MIT licensed

## Use Cases

- Find reliable AI API providers
- Compare pricing across gateways
- Discover OpenAI-compatible alternatives
- Monitor provider availability

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
- Live leaderboard: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
- Author: https://github.com/MackDing
- OPC Hub: https://opc.ren
